text:
The Trick Tower's 2nd Examiner is an anime-only character in the 1999 anime adaptation. He is one of the examiners who oversaw the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 13 (1999) 

Appearance

The Trick Tower's 2nd examiner is a man with black hair and a scar on his left cheek. He also dresses in the standard clothing given to the prisoners in Trick Tower. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The 2nd Examiner, along with Lippo and 3rd examiner, is first seen at the beginning of the Third Phase of the Hunter Exam. He oversees the Hunter examinees as they try and make their way through Trick Tower. 

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the 1999 anime adaptation.
